title: dilivaria ebracteata
intro: Dilivaria ebracteata, also known as Wild Celery or Wild Lovage, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apium. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dilivaria ebracteata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and help to reduce fever. Dilivaria ebracteata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for a range of health concerns.
